description:
An Advanced Slicing Software for AM Production

ideaMaker® is optimized for use with Raise3D solutions, enabling advanced 3D printing performance with a wide range of engineering and functional materials, including FFF and DLP technology.
- Short Learning Curve needed for Successful Printing
- Easy Access to Materials
- Streamlined Software
- Improved User Experience
- Improved the tree support generation when using per-group settings.
- Reduced the memory consumption of support painting operations.
- Improved the gap filling algorithm to reduce the processing time.
- Improved the slicing algorithm to avoid contours missing on some parts of the models.
- Improved profiles for Hyper Core PPA CF, Hyper Core PPA GF and Hyper Core ABS CF materials for the Raise3D Pro3 HS Series.
- Improved profiles for Premium PLA and Premium ABS materials for the Raise3D Pro3 Series with Hyper Speed Kit.
- Add new ORP resin materials: Henkel LOCTITE 3D IND147 Black, Henkel LOCTITE 3D IND403 Black, Henkel LOCTITE 3D IND5714 Gray.
